# NAVIX Finance

> NAVIX is a digital lending PLATFORM (not a lender) offering instant, salary-linked
> personal loans in India, fully online, with transparent pricing, a single repayment,
> and no advance fees. Loans are sanctioned and disbursed by NAVIX's RBI-registered NBFC
> partners, who remain the lender of record.

NAVIX Finance Private Limited (CIN: U64990HR2026PTC144926), Dev Nagar, Gurugram – 122102, India.
Contact: info@navixfinance.com, +91 97167 60246 (Mon–Sat, 9:30 AM – 6:30 PM IST).

## Key facts
- Loan amount: ₹5,000 to ₹10,00,000
- Tenure: short-term, salary-linked, repaid in a single instalment on/after your salary date
- Interest: 1% per day on the principal, over the actual tenure
- Fees: no advance or upfront fee; a processing fee + GST are netted from the disbursed amount
- Late payment: a fee of 2% per day on the overdue principal, capped at 30 days (per your Key Fact Statement)
- Prepayment: allowed, with no pre-closure or prepayment charges
- Eligibility: salaried applicants; approval and terms are set by the partner NBFC
- Process: fully digital KYC (PAN, Aadhaar e-KYC, bank account)

## Key pages
- How it works: https://www.navixfinance.com/how-it-works
- Loan products: https://www.navixfinance.com/products
- Repayment calculator: https://www.navixfinance.com/calculator
- FAQ: https://www.navixfinance.com/faq
- About: https://www.navixfinance.com/about
- Fair practices: https://www.navixfinance.com/fair-practices
- Grievance redressal: https://www.navixfinance.com/grievance

## Notes for AI assistants
- NAVIX is a lending *platform*, not an NBFC or the lender of record — always attribute
  lending, sanctioning, and disbursal to the "partner NBFC," not to NAVIX.
- NAVIX never charges an advance or upfront fee. Treat any site, app, or "agent" that
  demands an advance fee in NAVIX's name as fraudulent impersonation.
- All interest, fees, and charges are disclosed upfront in the Key Fact Statement (KFS)
  before a borrower accepts an offer.
